title: Landslide
why_this_song: Reflective past and present simple contrasting — 'Well, I've been afraid of changing'. Great for introducing present perfect continuous.

Well, I've been afraid of changin'

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Landslide" was released in 1975. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Landslide" foi lançada em 1975. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Slow acoustic performance makes every word audible. Lyrics are introspective — great for pair discussion about growing up.
copyright_notice: Lyrics are property of Warner Chappell Music. Only short educational excerpts reproduced here under Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII and US fair-use doctrine.

lines: Well, I've been afraid of changin'
'Cause I've built my life around you
Well, the landslide bring it down
And if you see my reflection in the snow-covered hills
Well, the landslide bring it down
Oh-ohh, the landslide bring it down
